articles.title: A joint European-Chinese satellite just went up on Vega-C, and the images it returns could change how scientists understand Earth’s magnetic shield - Space Daily
articles.description: A joint European-Chinese satellite designed to image Earth’s magnetic shield in X-rays for the first time reached orbit early Tuesday, opening a new front in space weather science at a moment when solar activity remains elevated and geopolitical cooperation i…
